heading: Regulations
label: 607 Regulations
text: The Secretary may promulgate such regulations as the Secretary determines to be appropriate to carry out the TIFIA program.
notes: Amendments2015— substituted “the TIFIA program” for “this chapter”.Pub. L. 114–942012— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The Secretary may issue such regulations as the Secretary determines appropriate to carry out this chapter.”Pub. L. 112–1412005—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 109–59, § 1602(d)section 187 of this title, substituted “this chapter” for “this subchapter”.Pub. L. 109–59, § 1602(b)(5)

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 114–94section 1003 of Pub. L. 114–94section 5313 of Title 5Oct. 1, 2015

Effective Date of 2012 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as an Effective and Termination Dates of 2012 Amendment note under .Pub. L. 112–141section 3(a) of Pub. L. 112–141section 101 of this titleOct. 1, 2012
